text: There were two high priests who could be described as ‘Simon the son of Onias’. One of these flourished about three hundred, the other about two hundred years before Christ. The former is probably the one here alluded to. We have no information elsewhere about the improvements which are described, somewhat obscurely, in verses 2-5.
vv. 24-26: It is not clear whether this is the formula of blessing used by Simon, or an epilogue written in the person of the author.
